title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: User revokes location permission after onboarding and app should gracefully handle Find My Device access with re-enable prompts
steps: Launch the app and complete the onboarding process, accepting the location tracking permission when prompted.
Navigate to the device's Settings > Apps > Poly Lens > Permissions.
Revoke the location permission for the app.
Return to the app and access the 'Find My Device' feature.
expected: The app should handle the revoked permission gracefully by showing appropriate prompts (e.g., explaining why location permission is needed) and providing a way for the user to re-enable the location permission.
